case_title: WONG, MAY DBA SF PROPERTIES vs. WAIT, ADAM et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, MAY DBA SF PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT WAIT, ADAM LEBER, ALEXANDER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LEBER, ALEXANDER ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WAIT, ADAM LEBER, ALEXANDER
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, MAY DBA SF PROPERTIES COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-10-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, PATTY DOWLING - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD; PLTF. SUBMITS JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAIT, ADAM LEBER, ALEXANDER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 328 PENNSYLVANIA AVE, APT. 24, STAYED UNTIL MAR-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFTS. SHALL PAY RENT DUE AND OWING FOR 12/94 & 1/95 BY CERTIFIED CHECK BEFORE 4PM, 1/11/95; DEFTS. SHALL PAY 2/95 RENT TIMELY; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
